title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
